questions.question: A body moving with uniform velocity has:
questions.explanation: Uniform velocity means both magnitude and direction are constant, hence acceleration (rate of change of velocity) is zero.
questions.subject: Physics

questions.question: The area under velocity-time graph represents:
questions.explanation: The integral of velocity with respect to time (area under the v-t graph) gives the displacement of the object.
questions.subject: Physics

questions.question: A ball is thrown vertically upwards with a velocity u. The maximum height attained is:
questions.explanation: Using v² = u² + 2as, at max height v=0, 0 = u² - 2gh => h = u²/2g.
questions.subject: Physics
